architecture_transfer_candidates.archive_builder_action: prototype a PR85 decoded-QH0 to QFQ4/grouped-FP serializer and paired runtime loader
architecture_transfer_candidates.next_gate: build a local serializer parity harness; do not exact-eval until runtime output parity passes
architecture_transfer_candidates.runtime_risk_reason: different model grammar; requires tensor/output parity and exact CUDA component gates
architecture_transfer_candidates.source_basis: PR90 model body is smaller than PR85 model segment, but not byte-identical or runtime-compatible

architecture_transfer_candidates.archive_builder_action: lower PR90-style compact pose plus sparse QRGB/control actions into an explicit PR85-family qpost candidate
architecture_transfer_candidates.next_gate: build local non-noop candidate with raw-output/runtime parity diagnostics before any eval claim
architecture_transfer_candidates.runtime_risk_reason: changes pose/color/control semantics; component deltas can dominate byte savings
architecture_transfer_candidates.source_basis: PR90 compact control body is smaller than the PR85 non-mask control stack, but semantics are different

pr90_nonidentity_size_signal.useful_conclusion: PR90 is a non-identity architecture signal, not a PR85 self-compression proof.

pr91_nonmask_identity.useful_conclusion: PR91 changes the mask segment only; any true PR85 non-mask byte reduction should stack byte-for-byte with PR91.
